overall.description: First-person motorcycle gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, riding a red ARCH motorcycle through the Badlands desert wasteland. The player travels along paved highways past rocky formations and abandoned structures, explores a waterfront dock area, and heads toward the distant futuristic skyline of Night City with its distinctive vertical beams of light.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert highway with power lines and bus stop

agents.ego_description: accelerating from stationary position at bus stop and riding along the desert highway

entered.detail: modern glass and metal bus shelter with bench seating
wooden utility poles with overhead power lines running parallel to road
tall palm trees scattered along the roadside
reddish-brown rocky desert hills and formations
futuristic city skyline with tall buildings and vertical light beams visible on horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at a desert bus stop shelter, with the player accelerating onto a paved highway. Power lines run parallel to the road while rocky hills rise on the left. The distant futuristic skyline of Night City is visible ahead, marked by distinctive vertical beams of light.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert highway with rocky outcrops

events.description: steers off the paved asphalt onto dirt terrain on the right side of road

agents.ego_description: maintaining high speed on the highway then transitioning onto dirt paths

notable_agents.action: abandoned truck parked on the roadside shoulder

entered.detail: derelict truck parked on the roadside
unpaved dirt trail branching off the main highway

segments.scene_description: The player continues driving along the desert highway, passing an abandoned truck on the right. Around the 20-second mark, the motorcycle transitions from paved asphalt onto dirt terrain, leaving the main road for off-road exploration.

scene_state.functional_zone: wasteland dirt paths approaching waterfront shantytown

events.description: approaching waterfront area with abandoned shacks and dock structures becoming visible

agents.ego_description: navigating dirt trails through desert wasteland toward the water's edge

entered.detail: dilapidated wooden shacks and makeshift structures
corrugated metal barrier running along the right side
large body of greenish water visible in the distance
tall transmission towers with glowing vertical beams

segments.scene_description: Riding through dirt trails in the wasteland, the player approaches a waterfront shantytown. Abandoned shacks appear on the left while a metal fence lines the right. The water body becomes visible ahead, with futuristic transmission towers glowing in the distance.

events.description: slowing to a stop at the water's edge near the wooden dock
executing a u-turn to head back away from the waterfront

agents.ego_description: approaching the dock area, stopping to observe the water, then turning around to exit

entered.detail: weathered wooden pier extending into the water with red canopy structure
broken concrete slabs along the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The player reaches the waterfront, stopping near a wooden dock with a red canopy that extends into the greenish water. After a brief pause at the shore surrounded by abandoned shacks, the motorcycle executes a turn to head back inland.

scene_state.functional_zone: wasteland return path with abandoned vehicles

events.description: transitioning from dirt back onto paved asphalt road

agents.ego_description: navigating back through the wasteland dirt paths, passing abandoned cars and debris

entered.detail: wrecked and abandoned vehicles scattered in the wasteland

segments.scene_description: Leaving the waterfront, the player drives through the wasteland dotted with abandoned cars and debris. The terrain gradually transitions back to paved asphalt as the motorcycle returns to the main highway.

agents.ego_description: accelerating along the paved road toward the city with palm trees lining the route

entered.detail: large white graffiti tags painted on the asphalt surface
modern bus shelter with glass panels

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the motorcycle speeding along a palm-lined highway back toward the city outskirts. White graffiti marks the road surface, and the futuristic city skyline grows larger ahead, with another bus stop visible on the right as the clip ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a desolate desert highway toward a futuristic waterfront settlement. It begins at a bus stop shelter, accelerating onto a paved road flanked by power lines and rocky hills while the distant skyline of Night City glows with vertical beams of light. As the ride continues past an abandoned truck, the camera transitions from the smooth asphalt onto rugged dirt terrain for off-road exploration. The scene then shifts into the wasteland's interior, passing abandoned shacks and a metal fence before finally opening up to a waterfront shantytown with glowing transmission towers in the distance.

The shot follows a continuous journey from a secluded waterfront retreat back toward the sprawling urban expanse of a futuristic city. It begins at a wooden dock with a red canopy extending over greenish water, pausing briefly among abandoned shacks before the motorcycle turns away from the shore. As the vehicle heads inland, the scenery shifts from a debris-strewn wasteland filled with abandoned cars to the smooth surface of a paved highway. The environment then opens up into a palm-lined corridor marked by white graffiti on the road, with the city skyline growing larger in the distance. Finally, the camera speeds past a roadside bus stop as the towering structures of the city outskirts loom ahead.
